No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education, equips students with technical skills for employment, and aims to enhance future competitiveness, directly aligning with Targets 4.3 and 4.4.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course promotes entrepreneurship by having students create self-media brands (Target 8.3) and focuses on technological upgrading for future competitiveness (Target 8.2).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course is explicitly an 'industry-academia cooperation innovative course' (產學合作創新課程), involving experts and top industry professionals, directly supporting multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.17).
